---
title: "Review: Prompting Chatbots"
crossref:
  lst-title: "🎯 Checkpoint 3."
  lst-labels: alpha a
format: live-html
sidebar: lesson-6
---

For this station, you will use the AI Chatbot [AgriGPT](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-yyNCmhyYL-agrigpt){target="_blank" rel="nofollow"} and prompt engineering to brainstorm possible solutions around a common horticultural problem.
<br>
<br>

<center>

### [**AgriGPT**](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-yyNCmhyYL-agrigpt){target="_blank" rel="nofollow"}

[![](images/AgriGPT_Image.png){width=50%}](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-yyNCmhyYL-agrigpt){target="_blank" rel="nofollow"}

</center>
